Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS DONNA HOGHOOGHI AND EDWARD BARTLETT'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NOS. CGC-19-574327 AND CGC-19-574569 WITH CASE NO. CGC-19-574168 is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order included with the moving papers.
